Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 13/12/2025

MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
The market softened during the week, with values continuing to face downward
pressure amid weak overall sentiment. Ongoing currency weakness continued to weigh on buyer confidence, limiting
participation in the local market.
